plugins.locationPermission: AcePick uses your location to find nearby professionals and service providers. For example, when you search for a plumber or electrician, we show available professionals within your area.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: AcePick uses your location to find nearby professionals, delivery riders, and service providers in your area. For example, when booking a service, we show you available professionals within your vicinity.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: AcePick uses your background location to track active delivery orders and ongoing service jobs. For example, when a rider is delivering your order, your location helps calculate accurate routes and estimated arrival times.

plugins.cameraPermission: Acepick needs access to your camera to take a profile picture.
plugins.photosPermission: Acepick needs access to your photos to let you set your profile picture.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Acepick needs camera access for video calls and profile pictures
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Acepick needs microphone access for voice calls
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: AcePick uses your location to show nearby professionals, delivery riders, and service providers. For example, when you search for a plumber or book a delivery, we use your location to find the closest available professionals and calculate accurate service areas.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: AcePick uses your background location to track active delivery orders and ongoing service jobs in real time. For example, when a rider is delivering your order, continuous location access allows you to track the delivery progress and receive accurate arrival time updates.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Acepick needs photo library access to upload profile pictures
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Acepick needs contacts access to invite friends
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Acepick uses Face ID to securely sign you in
